title: Module 1 — Java Basics
goal: Write, structure, and run your first Java programs.

lessons.title: Variables and Types
lessons.concept: Java is typed: int, double, String, boolean. Declaring with a type.

challenge.prompt: Inside main, declare an int called x set to 9, then print x.

lessons.title: Numbers and Math
lessons.concept: int vs double, arithmetic, integer division gotcha.

challenge.prompt: Declare a String name set to Sam, then print: Hi, Sam
